channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Democrats still don't agree on the seriousness of their political problem after election defeat
item.description: Nearly a month after a devastating election loss that exposed cracks in the very foundation of their party, Democrats remain deeply divided over the extent of their political problem — or even if they have one.
item.dc:creator: Steve Peoples And Joey Cappelletti, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump pick Kash Patel must prove he'll restore public faith in the FBI, a leading GOP senator says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump's drive to upend the FBI was welcomed by Republican senators although it was not clear on Sunday how strongly members of the incoming majority party would embrace his move to install ally Kash Patel as the next director of the Justice Department's top investigative arm
item.dc:creator: KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What the cost-of-living adjustment increase in Social Security means
item.description: A 2.5% cost-of-living adjustment increase will mean an extra $50 a month for most Social Security and SSI recipients.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Social Security reforms face uncertain future in Senate
item.description: A House-passed bill to reform aspects of Social Security is lingering in the Senate as questions bubble up over its path forward.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former high-level United Nations officials to launch 'DOGE-UN' to highlight agency inefficiencies
item.description: A group of former United Nations officials fed up with its inefficiency launching "DOGE-UN," an investigative effort that will highlight waste within the agency.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump selects veteran law enforcement officer Chad Chronister for DEA administrator
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump announced he would nominate Florida Sheriff Chad Chronister to serve as the administrator for the Drug Enforcement Agency. “I am pleased to nominate Sheriff Chad Chronister for Administrator of the Drug Enforcement Agency (DEA),” he wrote in a post on Truth Social.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Young men swung to the right for Trump after a campaign dominated by masculine appeals
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — For years, Pat Verhaeghe didn’t think highly of Donald Trump as a leader. Then Verhaeghe began seeing more of Trump’s campaign speeches online and his appearances at sporting events.
item.dc:creator: MATT BROWN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats look to governors to lead them to promised land
item.description: Democrats are looking to the governors of blue states as both a line of defense against the incoming Trump administration and a promising bench for the party in 2028.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Trump tariffs threaten to crack open North American economies
item.description: MEXICO CITY — President-elect Trump’s pledge to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada threatens to upend decades of North American integration, a bumpy process that’s recast the two U.S. neighbors as providers of raw and finished goods for the world’s biggest economy.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, NewsNation

item.title: Ranking the Democrats: Here's who the party could nominate next as president
item.description: Democrats are licking their wounds after Vice President Harris’s defeat to President-elect Trump, but already are looking toward who might lead their party in a 2028 presidential contest. It’s a fight that looks wide open.
item.dc:creator: Amie Parnes, NewsNation

item.title: Zuckerberg dines with Trump in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Donald Trump dined on Wednesday with Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg at the president-elect’s Mar-a-Lago club in Florida, bringing together the Facebook founder and the former president who was once banned from that social network.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Scott County official says 20 absentee ballots in close House race were likely tossed
item.description: The missing ballots are at the heart of a court challenge from Minnesota House Republicans who have said a 14-vote win for a DFLer there is clouded. The race will dictate House control.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota Republicans to challenge election result in Shakopee House race in court
item.description: After a recount upheld a DFL candidate’s narrow win, the outcome moves next to the courts for a race that would determine whether the Minnesota House is in GOP hands or tied next year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Post-election poll: Trump victory, cabinet choices, war, and aliens through voters' eyes
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's popularity is on the rise and the voters who went against him think World War III is likely.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Lawsuit challenges Minnesota abortion access in federal court
item.description: Minnesota has some of the most accommodating laws granting access to abortion. A lawsuit filed late last week seeks to upend them.
item.dc:creator: Ellie Roth, Anna Haecherl, and Matt Sepic, MPR News

item.title: New law forces landlords to notify tenants of bed bug infestations in NY
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – A new law in New York requires landlords to notify tenants of bed bugs within three days of an infestation. However, landlords are only required to inform renters near the infestation and those directly at risk.
item.dc:creator: Julie Millet, PIX 11
